message:
feat(e2e): add compliance test suites for redis, postgresql, and whisper connectors

Creates 9 new E2E tests (3 per connector) covering default_deny,
happy_path, and network_guard compliance for the three newest
connectors. Adds features and dev-deps to fcp-e2e Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
